office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy and oversee services, land use, and emergency management.
race_blurb: Incumbent Jon Neal faces Trinity Hightower-Stucker.

candidates.summary: Incumbent commissioner and former Oroville mayor with fire-service and regional-board experience.
highlights: Serves as incumbent after six years as mayor [S2][S3]

experience.basis: County incumbency, six years as mayor, and regional-board service establish a maximal governing record.

candidates.summary: Volunteer-fire participant emphasizing budgeting, cost control, wildfire readiness, permitting, and rural industry.
highlights: Calls for spending transparency and cost control [S2]

spending.basis: Explicit cost control and spending transparency support modest restraint.
